arts.ttl: Middlesbrough's five loanees and the chances that they stay at the Riverside beyond the season
arts.sum: So much so that it is understood that Boro are keen to discuss a potential Travers transfer with Bournemouth in the summer, with the club keen to sign the 25-year-old permanently. So what future do Boro ’s five loan players have at the club beyond this season?

arts.sum: Sheffield Wednesday are being eyed by Moroccan billionaire Anas Sefrioui, according to journalist Alan Nixon on his Patreon… The post Sheffield Wednesday considered by property tycoon in latest takeover news appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Former Chelsea boss Antonio Conte could hand summer transfer blow to Middlesbrough
arts.sum: However, having spent the majority of his senior career to date in Italy, and being fluent in the language, reports there this weekend suggest that Napoli are keen to sign him this summer, with Conte giving the potential deal a green light. Former Chelsea boss Antonio Conte could deliver a blow to Middlesbrough ’s summer transfer hopes, with reports in Italy suggesting he is keen to bring Samuel Iling-Junior to Napoli.

arts.ttl: Middlesbrough loanee Kelechi Iheanacho faces uncertain future after Victor Orta admission
arts.sum: Middlesbrough loanee Kelechi Iheanacho faces an uncertain future after Sevilla sporting director Victor Orta publicly admitted that they made a mistake in signing him. However, the Nigerian faces an uncertain future, with his struggles this season continuing on Teesside.

arts.ttl: Tommy Conway shows his true colours as he reflects on delivering big style for Middlesbrough
arts.sum: “In the way the game played out, 1-1, at this stage of the season as well, we obviously knew we had to come off the pitch with the three points, And in that moment, it’s just the kind of moment where I like to step up and do what I do best, and that’s put the ball in the back of the net. Though Conway couldn’t have known at that time, he was nevertheless well aware of just how important it was for Boro to win on Good Friday, making the cool nature of his successful spot-kick all the more impressive.
